meta.title: Shiv Shankar Mishra | Senior Solution Engineer
meta.description: Frontend-Focused Full-Stack Developer specializing in high-performance web applications.

hero.subtitle: Frontend-Focused Full-Stack Developer specializing in delivering and scaling high-performance, production-ready web applications.

segments.text: , a Frontend-focused Full Stack Developer with over

across gaming and enterprise domains. Currently a Senior Solution Engineer, I specialize in React, Next.js, and modern frontend architecture. Beyond coding, I mentor developers and collaborate closely with stakeholders to deliver real business impact.

skills.title: The Stack of Choice
skills.blurb: A modern and robust tech stack curated for performance, developer experience, and scalability.

items.title: Senior Solution Engineer
points: Leading end-to-end delivery of multiple production-grade applications, coordinating across frontend, backend, and QA teams
Owning frontend architecture using Next.js (App Router), React, and Redux, ensuring scalability and maintainability
Driving client discussions, requirement analysis, and feature planning for ongoing projects
Mentoring junior developers and improving team productivity and code quality

items.title: Solution Engineer
points: Developed and scaled casino and betting platforms using React, Next.js, Redux, Tailwind, and Material UI
Implemented real-time features using WebSockets, enabling dynamic updates and improved user engagement
Built and optimized admin backoffice systems, improving operational workflows and reducing manual effort
Enhanced SEO and performance using SSR (Next.js), improving page load times and discoverability

items.title: Full Stack Developer
points: Developed frontend for an Enterprise Chatbot using React and Microsoft Bot Framework (DirectLine)
Implemented features like speech-to-text and text-to-speech, improving accessibility and UX
Led a team of 7 frontend developers, ensuring timely delivery and quality standards
Designed and developed a secure admin dashboard, improving user management and system control

items.title: Alibaba Arcade
items.description: High-concurrency gaming ecosystem optimized for global scale, ensuring production-readiness and sub-100ms latency.

items.title: Vegas Coins
items.description: Secure digital wallet for gaming assets. Built with transactional integrity and multi-layer security.
